message:
fix(overlays): clear loading state on early return in 4 overlays

Per AGENTS.md overlay best practices, always clear loading state when
returning early from useEffect data fetching. Fixes:

- CGROverlay: early return and cache hit paths
- AnomalyOverlay: early return and cache hit paths
- CRISPROverlay: early return and cache hit paths
- FoldQuickviewOverlay: cache hit path

This prevents stuck loading spinners when phage changes or repository
is not ready.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
